activities.name: Baby’s first mile walk
activities.description: I had heart surgery 10 days ago, and have been home from the hospital for 4 days. Getting a little stronger every day. It’ll be a few months till I’m back running I think, so walking with friends is what I do. Thank you [strava://athletes/8506527/14]Herve Jamrozik for keeping up with my cracking 2mph pace!

activities.name: Walk with Monica and Chris while runners ran
activities.description: Felt good. Still getting noticably stronger each day.
